name: yandex-direct-agent
description: Codex plugin for Yandex Direct account audits with MCP-powered read access.

interface.shortDescription: Audit Yandex Direct accounts and check landing-page issues via MCP.
interface.longDescription: Yandex.Direct Agent helps run fast account audits in Codex using MCP data. It includes lightweight skills for campaign quality checks and landing-page 404 validation. After installation, connect through the MCP login flow to access your production data.
defaultPrompt: Run a full Yandex Direct account audit and highlight top risks.
Check landing pages from my active campaigns and flag 404 issues.
Summarize missing data and fetch required context via MCP first.
